sql: WITH cohort AS (SELECT CASE WHEN duration = 12 THEN 'short' WHEN duration IN (24, 36) THEN 'medium' WHEN duration IN (48, 60) THEN 'long' END AS duration_band, status, amount, payments FROM loan WHERE date >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND date < DATE '1997-01-01' AND status IN ('A', 'B') AND duration IN (12, 24, 36, 48, 60)) SELECT duration_band, COUNT(*) AS finished_loan_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS defaulted_loan_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'B' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS default_rate, AVG(amount) AS avg_loan_amount, AVG(payments) AS avg_payments FROM cohort GROUP BY duration_band ORDER BY CASE duration_band WHEN 'short' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 WHEN 'long' THEN 3 END;
